mapper.select: SELECT * FROM submission ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO submission (submission_id, problem_id, problem_title, user_id, username, code, language, status, submit_time) VALUES (#{submissionId}, #{problemId}, #{problemTitle}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{code}, #{language}, #{status}, #{submitTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE submission SET status = #{status}, runtime = #{runtime}, memory = #{memory}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, judge_log = #{judgeLog}, judge_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'AC'
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
